groups.purpose: Benign event photos used to validate safe moderation behavior.
Controlled samples used to validate review/block moderation thresholds.
Same anonymized or consented person across multiple photos in the same event.
Different people with partially similar appearance for false-positive pressure.
Blurred, dark, occluded, profile-extreme, and very small faces for quality gate tuning.
Same or similar people across different events to validate event_id isolation.

notes: Do not use this manifest as a benchmark until entries are populated with real anonymized or consented image assets.
The benchmark source of truth must be this manifest, not an ad-hoc local folder.
Provider smoke reports should copy provider/model/dimension/latency metadata to their own reports, not into this manifest.
